commands: vp migrate --no-interactive # existing Vite+ project: below-policy Node pins are preserved, not raised (native binding supports Node >=20)
cat .node-version # .node-version stays 24.3.0 (24.0-24.10 is below the support policy but valid for the binding)
node -e "const p=require('./package.json');console.log(p.engines.node, JSON.stringify(p.devEngines.runtime))" # engines.node stays 24.x and devEngines.runtime node stays ^24
